/usr/bin/cc -g CMakeFiles/FAV_PC_SP_23_24_BinaryDataInImg.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/FAV_PC_SP_23_24_BinaryDataInImg.dir/src/compression.c.o CMakeFiles/FAV_PC_SP_23_24_BinaryDataInImg.dir/src/image.c.o CMakeFiles/FAV_PC_SP_23_24_BinaryDataInImg.dir/src/payload.c.o CMakeFiles/FAV_PC_SP_23_24_BinaryDataInImg.dir/src/utils/logger.c.o CMakeFiles/FAV_PC_SP_23_24_BinaryDataInImg.dir/src/utils/memory_management.c.o CMakeFiles/FAV_PC_SP_23_24_BinaryDataInImg.dir/src/utils/binary_data.c.o CMakeFiles/FAV_PC_SP_23_24_BinaryDataInImg.dir/src/utils/dictionary.c.o CMakeFiles/FAV_PC_SP_23_24_BinaryDataInImg.dir/src/utils/utils.c.o CMakeFiles/FAV_PC_SP_23_24_BinaryDataInImg.dir/src/utils/trie.c.o -o FAV_PC_SP_23_24_BinaryDataInImg  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpng.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so
